headline: TIER IV accelerates AI-based Level 4 autonomous driving with NVIDIA's reasoning-based AI and world foundation models
summary: TIER IV, the pioneering force behind open-source software for autonomous driving, is deepening its strategic collaboration with NVIDIA to redefine the future of Level 4 autonomous driving. Key highlights of this collaboration include the integration of NVIDIA Alpamayo, an open portfolio of AI models, simulation frameworks and physical AI datasets, and NVIDIA Cosmos, a platform with open world foundation models, guardrails and data processing libraries. headline: 10x Genomics CRISPR Brain Atlas Collaboration And What It Means For Investors
summary: 10x Genomics (NasdaqGS:TXG) is collaborating with PerturbAI, NVIDIA, and the Allen Institute on what is described as the largest in vivo CRISPR brain atlas. The partnership combines 10x Genomics' single cell and spatial technologies with advanced AI and high performance computing to map gene function in the brain. The project is presented as a new resource for neuroscience and therapeutic research focused on brain function and disease. For readers tracking 10x Genomics, this collaboration...

headline: NVIDIA China H200 Return Reshapes AI Revenue And Regulatory Risk Profile
summary: NVIDIA (NasdaqGS:NVDA) has resumed H200 AI chip sales to China after securing regulatory approval from both U.S. and Chinese authorities. The company is restarting production and has received purchase orders, reopening a revenue stream that had been heavily constrained for nearly a year. The decision comes as export controls, new tariffs, and rising local competition continue to shape access to advanced AI hardware in China. NVIDIA sits at the center of the global AI hardware supply chain,...
